title: Zombies Improved
description: A small zombie modpack featuring lots of game-changing mods improving zombies and other undead creatures!
body:
A modpack featuring lots of improvements to zombies and other undead creatures, mostly made for my friends.

Mods:
- 80% Abandoned Villages
- Ashen's Zombie Apocalypse
- Contagion
- DarkMobs
- Giant Spawn
- Husk Spawn
- Sodium
- Indium
- Villager Converting
- Zombie Apocalypse Drops
- Zombie Horse Spawn
- Zombie Villagers From Spawner
- Zombies Are Coming
- Zombificationem
- Yamato Gun
- Stray Spawn
- Skeleton Horse Spawn
- Ruined Equipment
- Mod Menu
- AppleSkin
- Armorful
- Eating Animation
- Entity Culling
- Iris Shaders
- M.R.U
- Lithium
- Model Gap Fix
- ModernFix
- More Mob Variants
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Stray Spawn
- Voice Chat Interaction

Resource Packs:
- Fresh Animations
- Undopia Zombie Skins
- Villagers Refreshed
- Villagers Refreshed + Fresh Animations
  
Shaders:
- Insanity Shader
